title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Turning Point
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #24 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Luffy, Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #21, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I can't go back to windmill village...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If I'm around, would it be better...?

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Gahaha- haha, that'd be the worst!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Have you been punched by spikes before!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be stronger than anybody!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Hey, I've actually got a problem.

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: I've been living in this dump...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Why is there another brat here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: I've heard you're 4 no-good kid, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wonder if it'll rain Spears today?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: But are they really that important?

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Luffy, Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #21, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.
